title: spergularia salina var. urbica
intro: Spergularia salina var. urbica, also known as saltwort or sea sandwort, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as reduce swelling and pain. The plant is also known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Spergularia salina var. urbica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile and effective natural remedy for various ailments.
